text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru and I are on our way back to
the academy after a day out, when...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Gasp! Graaahhh!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I've r-really done it now! I stepped through the
school gate with my right foot!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: You know the old adage, right? "When ye entereth a main gate, ye must steppeth leftly. Ye who dareth to breaketh said rule..." Gulp...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
...Shalt reject the companion with whom ye
walked through!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
D-does that mean that you and I are going to
have a falling-out?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I can't let that happen, ever! There's only one
thing to do!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
And my fortune-telling shall tell us what that is!
Hoppity-rak! Roll on, my little fortune-telling
pencil, roll on!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She takes a pencil out of her pocket and hastily
rolls it on the ground...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
What's this?! Apparently, a liquid will solve our
worries!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Liquid... Liquid... Oh! Juice is a liquid! Wait right
here, I'll go buy some!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She disappears for a moment and comes back
with a bottle of my favorite juice.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
The color of the label happens to be today's
lucky color. Plus, it's the one you always get!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
That's only because you're always going out of
your way to help me! Knowing what you like is the
least I can do!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, how affable was your reaction just now!
We've definitely avoided any potential discord!
choice_data_list: Now, let me buy you one!
Now, let me buy you one!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, how affable was your reaction just now!
We've definitely avoided any potential discord!
choice_data_list: Now, let me buy you one!
Now, let me buy you one!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Huhwha?! There's no need to flatter me that
much!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, you know what I think? We've definitely
strengthened our friendship!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
We have the fortune-telling pencil to thank for
that! Praise be to the pencil!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru must have liked the
compliment. Afterwards, she makes a habit of
bringing me drinks every once in a while.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Whaaaaat? You're going to buy me a drink too?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I was just trying to prevent the impending discord
between us!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: But if you insist... Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
La-di-da! ♪ What a stroke of luck! All thanks to
my pencil's divine guidance! Now, what should I
choose?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, Matikanefukukitaru and I frequent the
vending machine on our breaks more often.
